posts.author: iruser (iruser)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi helpful Monday folks.

I am learning monday projects and portfolios

I am learning monday baselines after already learning gantt charts.

I have been able to create a baseline off my gantt chart which in turn automatically creates the Project Baseline and Difference columns on my project.

In my timeline column i am not enabling weekends.

image317×368 16.7 KB

When i delay my timeline start date by a week the difference calculation is 7 days.

ok from a math perspective this makes sense but from an accountability perspective the action is only 5 days late.

Is there a do not include weekends on this out of box difference functionality similar to the timeline? Is there a fancy formula to edit the existing formula to exclude weekends?

image450×182 9.62 KB

thanks in advance
